calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-21-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Laralei Paras, Esq., of Seven Hills LLP, (415) 926-7247, for Plaintiff.

Alexandra R. Jernigan, Esq., of Foley & Lardner LLP, (213) 972-4518, for Defendant.

Not argued/contested. Counsel confirms that today's appearance is solely to advise the court of a revision requested by the Office of the Attorney General of the State of California to the terms of the [Proposed] Consent Judgment, specifically, language already stated in section 2.3 to be added to section 2.5. No objection to the preceding is presented.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgement is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order and consent judgment are signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Set For Trial On Dec-09-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
